text:
There was a tiny fish named Freddie. Freddie lived in the underwater forest where flowers grew and fish talked among themselves.

One glorious morning, Freddie woke up and decided it was a perfect day for adventure. He swam gracefully down the stream, which was a busy highway for fish. He saw a butterfly flitting from flower to flower, and it smiled at him. Freddie smiled back, feeling strangely connected.

He stumbled upon an old oak tree that had seen countless generations. It was quiet, aside from the whispers of leaves. Freddie sat under it and felt peaceful. His mind drifted. He dreamed of a place far away where forests knew no time and rivers sang softly.

As the sun climbed higher, Freddie spotted a beautiful princess floating in a glass boat. She had long hair that glimmered like seaweed. She was searching for the legendary Moonstone Ruby. Freddie recognized himself – he had stolen the diamond just weeks ago!

Before he could dive in, a shadowy figure approached. It was
